lines.en_lit: And in a pan and to a deep container, smooths with his thumb above and with his little finger below. And this is difficult rite in the Temple. This one and no other? But there is pinching, and there is taking handful Rather, this is of difficult rites in the Temple.

Rabbi Yoḥanan said Rabbi Yehoshua ben Uza’a raised a dilemma: What between of his handfuls? Rav Pappa said that is on the inside, do not raise the dilemma, as it certainly the handful. that is on the outside, do not raise the dilemma, as it certainly remainder
let the dilemma be raised between What is Rav Yoḥanan said: Yehoshua ben Uza’a then resolved between is doubtful,

How does one perform Rabbi Ḥanina said: first burns the handful by itself, and then between. For if you say first between, perhaps they are remainders, and they are remainders that became reduced between taking the handful and burning, And the Master said: remainders that became reduced between taking the handful and the burning, one not burn the handful on their
If so, now too, apply here Whatever is partly in fire is subject to do not burn.

Rav Yehuda, son of Rabbi Shimon ben Pazi, said that burns it for the purpose of wood. in accordance with Rabbi Eliezer. As it was taught Rabbi Eliezer says: for a sweet savor you not bring up However, you bring up for the purpose of wood.

well according to Rabbi Eliezer, but according to the Rabbis, what can be said? Rav Mari said: that fat take handfuls Now that you have arrived at this Rabbi Eliezer as well, that fat take handfuls ab initio,

Bein habeinayim, pashat, umaḥatz, ufizer, veḥishev, baḥafinat, ḥaveiro: a mnemonic Rav Pappa raised a dilemma: What is in-between of his handfuls? What is his dilemma? If he derives “full” “full” there, this is that
Rav Pappa raised the dilemma his hands full and bring we require that is Or perhaps we require “And he shall take…and he shall bring” And that is not Let it stand
Rav Pappa said: obvious to me his handfuls people take a handful, Rav Pappa raised a dilemma: What is he took a handful with his fingertips,
what is downward upward what is from the sides, Let it stand

Rav Pappa said: obvious to me “His hands full” people fill their hands, Rav Pappa raised a dilemma: What is scooped a handful with his fingertips? what is from downward upward? What is from the side? what is he scooped a handful with this and with this and brought them together? Let it stand
